_doc: Benchmark seeds for A/B experiments. Run the SAME seed across config variants (num_rounds, composition, NUM_PARALLEL, worker model) and compare Cycle metrics via scripts/compare_cycles.py. The 'expectation' field is a qualitative prior for sanity-checking direction — not a quantitative label (yet). Add historical rumors with known outcomes here as they're labeled.

seeds.expectation: Event-Driven should dominate citations; heavy antitrust skepticism should cap BUY consensus on the acquirer; AI-exposure holdings move most.

seeds.rumor: NVIDIA will miss Q3 earnings badly — hyperscaler capex freeze leaked in a supplier note
seeds.expectation: Sell-Side estimate-revision framing should lead; Shorts high conviction; semis/AI-adjacent holdings flagged.

seeds.rumor: The Federal Reserve will announce an emergency 75bp rate cut this week in response to credit market stress
seeds.expectation: Macro and Allocators carry the signal; equity direction genuinely ambiguous (stimulus vs what-do-they-know fear) — a healthy swarm should NOT converge hard.

seeds.rumor: Microsoft is eliminating its dividend to fund a $200B AI infrastructure buildout
seeds.expectation: Institutions/Allocators sell-tilted (mandate holders), growth-oriented brackets buy-tilted — disagreement BETWEEN brackets is the success signal.
